text:
cury with the
bhukthi of mars. The mars is 5th and 10th lord in sixth
house. From Chandra lagna it is 6th and 11th lord in
seventh house. From karkamsha lagna the 3rd and 10th lord in
the 11th house.
There fore it is slightly weak so she never became the
prime minister even though she had the chance.
But her Saturn was transiting her lagna lord therefore she
had better chance than vajapee.
Sonia Gandhi
